title: 1. Dead Hangs
desc: Grab your pull-up bar, let your body hang completely loose. Focus on relaxing your shoulders and letting gravity pull your spine straight.
why: Opens up the tight chest muscles pulling your shoulders forward.

title: 2. Wall Angels
desc: Stand with back, head, and heels flat against a wall. Raise arms like a snow angel, keeping elbows and wrists touching the wall at all times.
why: Activates the weak lower trapezius muscles on your back.

title: 3. Chin Tucks
desc: Sit or stand tall. Gently pull your chin straight back (giving yourself a "double chin"). Do not look up or down, just straight back.
why: Strengthens deep neck flexors to fix forward head posture.
